self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Desert Pavilion: every 10s the wielder gains 24/30/36/42/48% (R1/R3/R5) of their own Elemental Mastery as bonus ATK for 12s. Auto-applied from the wielder's own live EM, selected by the leaderboard's chosen refinement for this weapon (main-weapon-pool selection).

others_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Desert Pavilion (support use, assumes R5): nearby party members gain 30% of the wielder's Desert Pavilion buff (=14.4% of the wielder's EM) as flat ATK. Type the support wielder's actual EM into this condition's input for an exact value; the checkbox-only fallback assumes 800 EM. Scoped as 'others' (not 'team') so it only applies when this weapon is on a support, not double-counted alongside the wielder's own self_conditional_modifiers_json conversion when they're the scored main.
